frozen: ground truth annotated manually by the author after reading the chat, BEFORE writing any extractor; never modified afterwards

claims.what: lexical BM25 beats sentence-transformer cosine on the technical-document set
anchor spans are contiguous in the source
deterministic replay and low-latency pull in different directions

constraints.what: every stage in the deterministic path must be bit-exact reproducible given identical input
core deterministic path cannot depend on embeddings or a vector store
embedding-using components must stay peripheral and never feed back into the core

decisions.what: batched-streaming ingestion, batch size 256, sorted by document hash
add a regression test that result is identical whether or not batches split documents; do not restrict batches to whole documents
rule out embeddings as the default; keep them only as an optional peripheral layer

conflicts.what: deterministic replay vs low-latency requirement (acknowledged, unresolved)

open_questions.what: how does batched streaming behave under hot-reload of the corpus, does ordering survive
who owns/monitors the optional embedding probe layer
regression test for anchor-contiguity is still missing
